ai_tips: Starting out at 2m — 3.23km ahead with 3m of climbing on the profile. 从海拔2米出发——全程3.23公里，累计爬升3米。
0.33km in — pace 5:27/km as the effort builds. 进行到0.33公里——配速5:27/公里，强度正在建立。
Mid-run at 1.85km — the route is largely flat to downhill (total climb just 3m), so rhythm matters more than strength. 进行到1.85公里过半程——路线以平路和下坡为主（总爬升仅3米），节奏比力量更关键。
High point of the route: 5m at 1.62km. From here the route mostly gives back. 全程最高点5米，位于1.62公里处。此后路线总体向下。
Steepest descent of the day: -2.8% at 1.68km — you let it flow at 6:06/km, good downhill confidence. 全天最陡的下坡：1.68公里处坡度-2.8%——你顺势加速到6:06/公里，下坡信心不错。
3.11km — late-run check: pace 13:01/km, effort showing as the pace slips. 3.11公里——后程检查：配速13:01/公里，疲劳显现，配速下滑。
Finished 3.23km in 20:51 (avg 6:28/km, +3m). Solid, steady effort end to end. 完成3.23公里，用时20:51（平均配速6:28/公里，爬升3米）。全程稳定扎实。
